title: Yes It's A Kids' Game
description: Yes It's A Kids' Game provides pretty and perfectly child-friendly rainbows in your game world. These can be configured to be as subtle or flamingly obvious as you'd like.
body:
Yes It's A Kids' Game provides pretty and perfectly child-friendly rainbows in your game world. These can be configured to be as subtle or flamingly obvious as you'd like.

![A rainbow in Minecraft at night arcs from the bottom left of the screen to the top right. Stars are visible in the background, and the land is otherwise flat and featureless.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1308661cbcd0d38d72dec98e47b017c461625a0d_0.webp)

Currently there is only one rainbow type implemented - the standard pretty rainbow effect seen in the screenshot above. Additional rainbow patterns and locations will be added in future versions - perhaps hidden in the water, or on all of the frogs?
